highlight: Build an intelligent research system demo with data collection, knowledge integration, and report generation in one week
industry: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Science & Education

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build an 1111 intelligent research system demo with data collection, knowledge integration, and report generation in one week

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Intelligent research tasks are widely used in competitive analysis, regulatory review, training and learning scenarios across industries such as finance & trade, consulting & management, public policy, marketing, and enterprise operations, with extensive demand and high usage frequency.

**Solution**: Based on user-input research topics and keywords, this system automatically collects relevant materials, performs knowledge extraction and integration through intelligent workflows, and ultimately generates and outputs research documents according to predefined templates.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Science & Education, Finance & Trade
**Category**: Service, Operations, Management
**Technology**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Text Generation

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 3.5-5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency in manual research: Completing a comprehensive research report (such as industry analysis, competitive analysis reports) typically requires professional researchers 1-3 weeks for data collection, organization, analysis, and writing

- Difficulty in information integration: Faced with massive information sources, manual screening and integration can easily miss important content, and it is difficult to ensure information accuracy and timeliness
- Inconsistent report formats: Different personnel and institutions have significantly different writing styles and layout requirements, affecting report standardization and consistency

- High update and maintenance costs: Rapidly changing market environments require continuous investment in updating and maintaining research report versions; forming research teams or inviting experts also incurs additional costs

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Internet-wide data collection: Automatically collect relevant materials across the internet based on user-input topics and keywords
- Information integration and analysis: Extract key information from collected candidate materials and generate insights and summaries
- Automatic report generation: Automatically generate structured research documents according to predefined templates

subsections.title: 3.1 Version Information
content: - Version Type: Private Deployment - Server Deployment
- Practitioner Information: Real-World AI Self-developed and Verified
- Original Author English Name: Real-World AI
- Author Website: This Site
- Related References: Claude Code (by Anthropic), Metaso MCP (by Metaso Tech), GLM-4.7 (by Zhipu)
- Initial Release Date: 2025-11-20
- Last Updated: 2026-02-02
- Last Reviewed: 2026-02-02

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: **Performance Improvement**:

- This solution achieved a comprehensive score of 51.86 on the Deep Research benchmark DeepResearch Bench, ranking 2nd among all open-source available solutions on the leaderboard as of December 24th (within 1.5% of the 1st place solution tavily-research (51.97)), ensuring accurate and credible report generation, enhancing user experience
- The solution's average report generation time is ≤15 minutes, 33% faster than salesforce-air-deep-research (average ~20 minutes), improving research efficiency
**Cost Optimization**:
- This solution supports using high-performance large models with relatively lower API costs such as GLM-4.7 as the foundation, saving nearly 60% in operational costs

- This solution achieves report template fit ≥95%, format compliance ≥99%, reducing labor costs by approximately 95% compared to manual solutions (~1 week, requiring communication, research, expert consultation, proofreading, formatting processes)

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/DCXfwDrSnip1q1kePdscpcl0n7b?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**:
- Single document research accuracy: Report template fit ≥95%, format compliance ≥99%, streamlining format revision processes
- Single document review time: Reduced to under 15 minutes (manual requires 1 week), supporting large-scale, stable batch generation
- Single document labor cost: Combined with the above efficiency metrics and technical metrics below, can reduce manual operation and review costs by 95%, improving user experience
**Core Technical Metrics**:
- Single document research performance comprehensive evaluation: DeepResearch Bench comprehensive score ≥51, ensuring generated report credibility
